summary: Tappable +/- RoE sign badge on the Auto Close TP/SL fields: defaults, toggle flips the sign while keeping the value and recomputing the trigger, preset-flips-sign, a negative take-profit and a positive stop-loss.

before_after_pairs.label: RoE sign badges added: + on Take Profit, - on Stop Loss (AC1)
before_after_pairs.note: Before: RoE fields had no sign control. After: a tappable badge shows + (TP) / - (SL).

before_after_pairs.label: Tapping the TP sign badge flips + to - while keeping the value and recomputing the trigger (AC2/AC3)
before_after_pairs.note: Before: badge + with 25% and the trigger above entry. After: badge - with 25% kept and the trigger recomputed below entry (a negative return).

standalone.label: Negative TP RoE (-10%) yields a below-entry trigger price and enables Set (AC6)
standalone.note: Badge -, 10% RoE -> trigger $1582.65 below current $1,666.3 (Expected loss); Set is enabled.

standalone.label: Tapping the +25% preset while the badge is - flips it back to + (AC5)
standalone.note: Preset chip's natural sign overrides the toggled badge sign.

standalone.label: Positive Stop Loss: SL badge + with value kept, trigger above entry (AC4)
standalone.note: After flipping SL to +, the 5% value is kept and the trigger recomputes above entry ($1657 > $1617, Expected profit) — a floor-gain stop loss.

videos.note: Full recipe run (AC1-AC7) on the live iOS simulator.
